title: MCP Payload Guard with typed errors (R12 + R11.4)
description: Per Gemini G8 + D28: MCP-first stabilization needs payload size enforcement. New shared/node/mcp-payload-guard.ts with 16KB warn / 64KB hard limit thresholds, configurable via fabric.config.json.mcpPayloadLimits. Hard limit triggers MCPError (from FabricError taxonomy, R11.4). Particularly relevant for fab_get_rule_sections if a section is large.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — closes 'tool blows up client context' failure mode + uses MCPError

files.change: NEW: enforcePayloadLimit(payload, { warnAt, hardAt }); on warn → emit ledger event + add response.warnings; on hard → throw MCPError
Wrap response build with enforcePayloadLimit (via middleware or explicit call site at handler tail)
NEW: warn at 16KB / hard error at 64KB / config override / MCPError shape

criteria: Payload 16-64KB returns response with warning (no failure)
